scope.selection_rule: High-confidence source-stated duplicate person entities, exact matching entity_name values, disjoint from prior Codex identity prep/apply batches through 071 and current identity override/guard records.

decisions.reason: Both records are person entities with source-stated entity_name 'Randolph Glucksman'. The target already aggregates multiple meeting sources for the same named individual.
Both records are person entities with source-stated entity_name 'Hugo Pizarro'. The target carries the fuller role context while preserving the same personal identity.
Both records are person entities with source-stated entity_name 'Mark Roche'. The target has broader recurring source coverage for the same named MTA C&D staff identity.
Both records are person entities with source-stated entity_name 'Monica Murray' and auditor-general context. The target consolidates the repeated role context across multiple sources.
Both records are person entities with source-stated entity_name 'Robert Paley'. The target already has broader multi-source coverage for the same named person.
Both records are person entities with source-stated entity_name 'Robert Paley'. This is a second unmerged single-source Robert Paley record pointing to the same broader target.
Both records are person entities with source-stated entity_name 'Sunil Nair'. The alias adds role/title wording but refers to the same named person represented by the target.
Both records are person entities with source-stated entity_name 'Rosalyn Green' and diversity/deputy-chief context. The target has broader source coverage for the same named individual.
Both records are person entities with source-stated entity_name 'Rosalyn Green'. The alias is another single-source Dr. Rosalyn Green record and matches the same target identity.
Both records are person entities with source-stated entity_name 'Miriam G. Harris'. The names are exact matches, including middle initial.

commands_used_for_evidence: pwd && rg --files data/review_notes data/identity-overrides data/canonical 2>/dev/null | sed -n '1,220p'
sqlite3 data/canonical.db '.tables' && sqlite3 data/canonical.db 'pragma table_info(records); pragma table_info(identity_aliases); pragma table_info(do_not_merge); pragma table_info(evidence_refs);'

bun -e '<read-only candidate scan over data/canonical/entities.jsonl, data/identity-overrides/merges.json, data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json, prior data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch*-prep.json through batch071, and data/canonical.db identity_aliases/records>'
bun -e '<read-only exact-name person candidate listing and merged-status review for selected candidate names>'

bun -e '<read-only aggregate guard verification for selected 10 aliases against canonical JSONL, canonical.db records, identity_aliases, current merges, do-not-merge, prior prep through batch071, and evidence source paths>'

deferred_low_confidence_examples.reason: Exact Jai Patel match, but another Jai Patel record is already present in current merge records; deferred to avoid forming a parallel identity island.
Exact Lamond Kearse match, but another Lamond Kearse record is already present in current merge records; deferred for a follow-up cluster-aware pass.
Exact Patrick Warren match, but another Patrick Warren record is already present in current merge records; deferred for cluster-aware target selection.
Exact Raymond Smyth match, but another Raymond Smyth record is already present in current merge records; deferred to avoid a split canonical target.
